emails.subject: Organizational Announcement
emails.body: Mark: Should we get Cheryl Nelson to start getting up to speed on some of= =20 the transportation and shipping issues? Let me know. Mark Haedicke Forwarded by Mark E Haedicke/HOU/ECT on 12/20/2000 03:56 PM =09Enron Global Markets LLC Office of the Chairman@ENRON =09Sent by: Enron Announcements@ENRON =0912/18/2000 09:21 PM =09=09 =09=09

emails.subject: Organizational Announcement
emails.body: Mark: Should we get Cheryl Nelson to start getting up to speed on some of= =20 the transportation and shipping issues? Let me know. Mark Haedicke Forwarded by Mark E Haedicke/HOU/ECT on 12/20/2000 03:56 PM =09Enron Global Markets LLC Office of the Chairman@ENRON =09Sent by: Enron Announcements@ENRON =0912/18/2000 09:21 PM =09=09 =09=09

emails.subject: Re: Organizational Announcement
emails.body: Re: Organizational Announcement My understanding is that the transportation and shipping business is all=20 being done physically right now. Our plan was to get Cheryl involved with= =20 the derivatives contracts first. Since there is so much more written about= =20 them and more of an industry consensus as to what they should look like, we= =20 thought it would be easier for her to learn the ropes in this area. =20 =09Mark E Haedicke =0912/20/2000 03:59 PM =09=09=20 =09=09

emails.subject: Re: Organizational Announcement
emails.body: Re: Organizational Announcement My understanding is that the transportation and shipping business is all=20 being done physically right now. Our plan was to get Cheryl involved with= =20 the derivatives contracts first. Since there is so much more written about= =20 them and more of an industry consensus as to what they should look like, we= =20 thought it would be easier for her to learn the ropes in this area. =20 =09Mark E Haedicke =0912/20/2000 03:59 PM =09=09=20 =09=09
